purpose: Aggregate, source-transparent election intelligence for public-interest and advisory analysis.
allowed_uses: Coalition and runoff scenario stress testing using public data
County/constituency planning at aggregate level once official baselines are added
prohibited_uses: Ethnic, religious, health, or sensitive-trait targeting
Voter suppression, intimidation, or turnout-depression strategy
Covert persuasion or deceptive influence operations
Use of private, hacked, purchased, or non-consensual personal data
model_boundaries: Scenario outputs are sensitivity tests, not forecasts.
Seat projections require constituency-level baselines before being treated as decision-grade.
Poll types are not interchangeable; approval, popularity, candidate preference, and party support must remain separated.
Every public value must retain source URL, pollster, date, extraction status, and confidence score.
Ambiguous extractions must go to review_queue.json and must not be automatically published.
Phase 1 normalized tables are structural scaffolds; missing official baseline values must not be treated as zero or estimated values.
